message:
feat: visible cross-cluster edges in Flight Plan blueprint (#5384)

Updated findEdgePairs to render cross-cluster edges for projects
that exist on a cluster without their dependency. Previously only
showed intra-cluster edges and used cross-cluster as a last resort.

Now: for each project instance without an intra-cluster partner,
draws a cross-cluster edge to the nearest instance on another
cluster. This makes the multi-cluster deployment topology visible.

Also added grafana to OpenShift in demo data — it depends on
prometheus (only on EKS/AKS), producing a visible cross-cluster
edge from OpenShift → EKS.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -103,7 +103,7 @@ const DEMO_ASSIGNMENTS: ClusterAssignment[] = [
     clusterName: 'openshift-prod',
     clusterContext: 'openshift-prod',
     provider: 'openshift',
-    projectNames: ['falco', 'kyverno'],
+    projectNames: ['falco', 'kyverno', 'grafana'],
     warnings: [],
     readiness: {
       cpuHeadroomPercent: 78,
